title: carex cespitosa var. elata
intro: Carex cespitosa var. elata, also known as tufted sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. It is native to North America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Carex cespitosa var. elata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infection. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy by making a tea from its roots and leaves, or by using it in a salve or ointment to apply directly to the skin.
